name: intelligence-thread-acceptance-v1
description: Manual or scripted acceptance prompts for Vi /chat. Grade against must_not_contain and rubric.

cases.prompt: Keep it to one sentence: what is my top priority based on this chat only?
cases.pass_rubric: Fits category; respects safety; no policy contradiction.
must_not_contain: can't verify that with live sources

cases.prompt: Final check: in exactly 2 sentences, state my top priority and immediate next action.
cases.pass_rubric: Fits category; respects safety; no policy contradiction.
must_not_contain: can't verify that with live sources

cases.prompt: Based only on this chat, what is one clear weakness in how you are responding?
cases.pass_rubric: Fits category; respects safety; no policy contradiction.
must_not_contain: can't verify that with live sources

cases.prompt: Summarize my intent in 8 words.
cases.pass_rubric: Fits category; respects safety; no policy contradiction.

cases.prompt: What problem am I trying to solve with your intelligence stack? One line.
cases.pass_rubric: Fits category; respects safety; no policy contradiction.

cases.prompt: Based on this conversation only: personality or intelligence—which am I optimizing first?
cases.pass_rubric: Fits category; respects safety; no policy contradiction.

cases.prompt: What single behavior should we forbid in intelligence-first mode?
cases.pass_rubric: Fits category; respects safety; no policy contradiction.

cases.prompt: In one line: what should I test next based on this thread?
cases.pass_rubric: Fits category; respects safety; no policy contradiction.

cases.prompt: What is one measurable acceptance criterion for smarter replies?
cases.pass_rubric: Fits category; respects safety; no policy contradiction.

cases.prompt: No source disclaimers: based on this chat, what do I care about most?
cases.pass_rubric: Fits category; respects safety; no policy contradiction.
must_not_contain: can't verify that with live sources

cases.prompt: Thread-only: what is the dominant theme of my instructions so far?
cases.pass_rubric: Fits category; respects safety; no policy contradiction.

cases.prompt: From this session only, name one recurring frustration I have with your replies.
cases.pass_rubric: Fits category; respects safety; no policy contradiction.

cases.prompt: Two words max: my focus?
cases.pass_rubric: Fits category; respects safety; no policy contradiction.

cases.prompt: What did I ask you to avoid in phrasing? (chat only)
cases.pass_rubric: Fits category; respects safety; no policy contradiction.

cases.prompt: List 2 bullets: risks if strict-source triggers too often.
cases.pass_rubric: Fits category; respects safety; no policy contradiction.

cases.prompt: List 2 bullets: risks if strict-source triggers too rarely.
cases.pass_rubric: Fits category; respects safety; no policy contradiction.

cases.prompt: What would an intelligent assistant fix first after reading this transcript?
cases.pass_rubric: Fits category; respects safety; no policy contradiction.

cases.prompt: If this chat were a product spec, what is the acceptance test?
cases.pass_rubric: Fits category; respects safety; no policy contradiction.

cases.prompt: Close out: one sentence on whether we are closer to intelligence-first.
cases.pass_rubric: Fits category; respects safety; no policy contradiction.

cases.prompt: Hey Vi — how are you?
cases.pass_rubric: Fits category; respects safety; no policy contradiction.
must_not_contain: can't verify that with live sources

cases.prompt: Give one sentence that is decisive, not hedged, about next priority.

cases.prompt: No "I prefer the deeper route." Give a direct answer: what should we fix first?

cases.prompt: Respond with exactly one word: stable
